name: position-chain-in-evolution
description: Position an already-built value chain in evolution. Routes each node to its per-type strategy (functional / solution / anchor) via the mass positioner, then renders the positioned map as SVG. Input is the JSON-labre map from draw-value-chain (an external OWM map is pre-parsed via runCommand render:wardley-map:owm:parse:dsl). A listener surfaces pipeline opportunities revealed once evolution is known.
